ValidationRule.description: Once payment is remitted, Remitted date, remitted cheque number and remitted to values should be populated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( Is_Payment_Remitted__c = True, ISBLANK(Remitted_Back_To__c ), ISBLANK(Remitted_Cheque_Number__c ), ISBLANK(Remitted_Date__c ) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Remitted_Cheque_Number__c )), Is_Payment_Remitted__c = False, ISBLANK(Remitted_Back_To__c ), ISBLANK(Remitted_Date__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Is Payment Remitted and Remitted Back To values are required
